C0300C BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Day of Week CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether the resident knew the correct day of the week. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Incorrect or no answer
1=Correct
^=Blank(skip pattern)
99 C0400A_RCALL_FIRST_WORD_CD C0400A_RCALL_FIRST_WORD_CD C0400A BIMS: Recall - Able to Recall Sock CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to recall the first word. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No-could not
